title: The Canal Bank (The Rocky Road To Dublin)
content:
I know a girl,
            And a girl knows me,
                And the owl says, what?
                And the owl says, who?
        But what we know
            We both agree
        That nobody else
            Shall hear or see,
        It's all between
            Herself and me:
                To wit? said the owl,
                To woo, said I,
            To-what, to-wit, to-woo!
meaning:
This evocative piece by James Stephens, titled "The Canal Bank (The Rocky Road To Dublin)", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
